## Checklist

- [ ] The entry is in the correct section.
- [ ] The description ends with a period.
- [ ] The description starts with a capital letter.
- [ ] The description is ≤ 20 words and objective (no marketing language).
- [ ] The link resolves.
- [ ] The project has meaningful activity in the last 6 months, or is foundational/canonical.
- [ ] The entry is not a duplicate of an existing entry.
- [ ] Entries are in alphabetical order within the section (except Foundational Reading, which is chronological).
- [ ] I have read [contributing.md](contributing.md).
